title: Jiliby's modpack
description: An attempt to make Minecraft more interesting and engaging
body:
Modpack aimed at improving the classic gaming experience without introducing drastic changes to the gameplay. 
Сreated primarily for my friends and co-op play on my server, but can also be used for single player.
# Features:
 - improved world generation (Terralith, Tectonic, Amplified Nether)
 - reworked classic and added new structures (Explorify, YUNG's mods, ToT, CTOV)
 - more diverse opponents (Upgraded Mobs, More Mobs, Mob Captains, True Ending)
 - tons of QoL improvements (5 new equipment options, improvements for shields, tridents and axes, saving loot in the grave upon death, random rewards for boring mining and much more)


Based on Fabulously Optimized modpack for better client performance.
[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/built-with/fabulously-optimized_46h.png)](https://download.fo)
